resume_job_01.title: Product Owner / Solution Architect – Provider Data & Data Quality- REMOTE
resume_job_01.base_summary: Senior Technical Business Analyst specializing in financial data platforms, API ecosystems, and enterprise modernization — 12+ years spanning LSEG, Refinitiv, and Aon. Drives AI adoption on Snowflake and AWS by translating complex business problems into scalable, governed data solutions that accelerate delivery and improve enterprise decision-making.
resume_job_01.new_summary: Senior Technical Business Analyst with 12+ years delivering data platforms, API ecosystems, and analytics solutions in enterprise environments. Deep expertise in SQL, Power BI, Snowflake, and AWS with a strong record of translating complex business needs into actionable data insights for frontendnode-production.up.railway.app.
